metadata.title: Do You Really Want To Hurt Me (Dub Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:08.52] Give me time
[00:09.89] To realize my crime
[00:14.83] Let me love and steal
[00:18.02] I have danced inside your eyes

[00:26.32] Do you really want to hurt me
[00:28.43] Do you really want to make me cry

[00:55.13] Lovers never ask you why
[00:59.99] In my heart the fire's burnin'
[01:03.59] Choose my color find a star

[01:08.86] That's a step, a step too far
[01:11.26] Do you really want to hurt me
[01:13.73] Do you really want to make me cry
[01:16.24] Do you really want to hurt me
[01:18.94] Do you really want to make me cry
[01:28.52] Words are few I have spoken
[01:31.27] I could waste a thousand years
[01:33.98] Wrapped in sorrow words are token
[01:36.70] Come inside and catch my tears
[01:40.54] You've been talkin' but believe me
[01:43.30] If its true you do not know
[01:46.97] This boy loves without a reason
[01:54.16] I'm prepared to let you go
[01:58.97] If it's love you want from me
[02:02.27] Then take it away
[02:08.53] Everything is not what you see
[02:12.11] It's over again

[02:23.02] Do you really want to hurt me
[02:28.93] Do you really want to make me cry
[03:00.84] Cry, cry, cry
[03:01.24] Cry, cry, cry
[03:05.31] Cry, cry, cry
